task: move to the box, then place the pink object
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS -** A white plastic tray is on a wooden surface. A small pink object is on the tray. The tray is a rigid container with a flat base and open top. The pink object is small and likely a ball or cube. STRATEGY - First, reach for the tray to access the pink object. Then, grasp the pink object from the tray. Transport the pink object to a new location (assumed to be the wooden surface outside the tray). Finally, place the pink object on the wooden surface. Failure modes include missing the pink object during grasp or dropping it during transport. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the tray to access the pink object; Step 2 grasp the pink object from the tray; Step 3 transport the pink object to the wooden surface; Step 4 place the pink object on the wooden surface.

Goal: on(pink_object, wooden_surface); stable(pink_object)
Scene: pink_object, tray, wooden_surface
Step 1: reach(tray)
  affordance_region: the body of the white plastic tray
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, tray, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, tray) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(pink_object)
  affordance_region: the pink object on the tray
  contact: holding(pink_object) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(pink_object)
Step 3: transport(pink_object -> wooden_surface)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the wooden surface
  spatial: above(pink_object, wooden_surface, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(pink_object)
  done_when: above(pink_object, wooden_surface, 0.05)
Step 4: place(pink_object -> wooden_surface)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the wooden surface
  contact: surface_contact(pink_object, wooden_surface) [completion]; released(pink_object) [completion]
  pose: stable(pink_object) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(pink_object, wooden_surface) AND released(pink_object)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the white plastic tray
the pink object on the tray
an empty area on the wooden surface
an empty area on the wooden surface
